events.title: AI Agents & Crypto Infrastructure
events.description: Deep dive into autonomous agent architectures and the crypto rails powering them. Builders and founders only — bring your stack.

events.title: DeFi × AI: The New Stack
events.description: Panel discussion on where DeFi protocols meet AI-native applications. Live demos from three local teams.

events.title: Founders Roundtable
events.description: Invite-only session for founders and senior builders. Candid conversation about what's working, what isn't, and what's next.

events.title: Builder Demo Night
events.description: Open demo night. Five-minute slots, anyone can present. Agents, apps, protocols — if you built it, show it.
